text: Margin compression presents a notable operational risk. Operating margin contracted significantly from 40.86% in Q3 2024 (C020) to 19.77% in Q2 2025 (C006, K003), representing a decline of over 20 percentage points. Net margin similarly compressed from 36.66% in Q3 2024 (C022) to 20.74% in Q2 2025 (C008, K004). This compression could indicate increased competitive pressure, rising operational costs, or pricing challenges in the travel services market. The company maintains high R&D intensity at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 ($610M R&D on $3,096M revenue) (C009, K005), which supports innovation but adds ongoing cost pressure. Severity: Medium-High.

issues.explanation: K003 is cited as a calculation reference for the operating margin figure, but no calculation results are provided in the cited calculation results section. The chunk C006 alone supports the 19.77% figure.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove K003 citation or provide the actual calculation result. C006 alone supports the operating margin figure.

issues.explanation: K004 is cited as a calculation reference for the net margin figure, but no calculation results are provided in the cited calculation results section. The chunk C008 alone supports the 20.74% figure.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove K004 citation or provide the actual calculation result. C008 alone supports the net margin figure.

issues.explanation: K005 is cited as a calculation reference for the R&D intensity calculation, but no calculation results are provided in the cited calculation results section.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove K005 citation or provide the actual calculation result showing the 19.70% R&D intensity calculation.

issues.explanation: The revenue figure of $3,096M is stated in the paragraph but is not supported by any cited chunk. Only C009 is cited, which supports the $610M R&D expense figure but not the revenue figure needed to calculate R&D intensity.
issues.recommended_fix: Add a chunk citation that supports the Q2 2025 revenue figure of $3,096M, or remove the specific revenue figure and only state the R&D intensity percentage if supported by a calculation result.
